quirks.title: Key is account_id:token
quirks.body: Cloudflare Workers AI authenticates with a combined credential in the form "account_id:token", not a bare token.

quirks.title: Daily :free cap is account-wide
quirks.body: OpenRouter’s :free daily cap (50/day, or 1000/day once you have ever bought $10 of credits) is shared across ALL :free models on the account, not per model. Per-row rpd values here are therefore optimistic; the router’s cooldown handling absorbs the shared 429s.

quirks.title: Thinking tokens use output cap
quirks.body: Gemini Flash can spend hidden thinking tokens inside maxOutputTokens. Avoid tiny max_tokens values or set thinkingBudget to 0 when provider support is available.

quirks.title: Recurring free, 40 RPM, eval-only ToS
quirks.body: NVIDIA NIM replaced its depleting trial credits with a recurring per-account rate limit (40 RPM default, varies by model), verified June 2026. The trial ToS still scopes usage to evaluation/prototyping, not production.

quirks.title: Limited-time promo, roster rotates
quirks.body: OpenCode Zen free models are explicitly limited-time promotional access ("available for a limited time" per the docs), not a recurring quota. The roster rotates: qwen3.6-plus and minimax-m3 promos already ended. Expect any row here to die without notice; prompts/outputs may be used for model improvement.

quirks.title: May emit reasoning prose
quirks.body: Cohere Command A Reasoning can spend output budget explaining its thought process on terse prompts. Use a larger max_tokens cap or a stricter no-reasoning instruction when exact short answers are required.

quirks.title: No API key required
quirks.body: Routes anonymously — the catalog ships a keyless sentinel row and calls work with no account or key.

quirks.title: Anon tier degraded (1 concurrent)
quirks.body: Pollinations’ legacy text API is deprecated for authenticated users (replacement enter.pollinations.ai is pay-as-you-go), but anonymous access is explicitly unaffected. Anon is queue-limited to 1 concurrent request per IP and serves a single model (openai-fast); expect 429 "Queue full" under any parallelism. Live-probed 2026-06-10.

quirks.title: Works with existing Zhipu key
quirks.body: glm-4.6v-flash is listed Free on Z.AI and answers 200 with the existing bigmodel.cn key; vision and structured tool calls both live-verified.

quirks.title: Needs token room
quirks.body: Some free routes spend hidden reasoning tokens before visible output. Avoid tiny max_tokens values or requests can finish by length with empty content.

quirks.title: Thinking tokens use output cap
quirks.body: Gemini Flash can spend hidden thinking tokens inside maxOutputTokens. Avoid tiny max_tokens values or set thinkingBudget to 0 when provider support is available.

quirks.title: May emit reasoning prose
quirks.body: Cohere Command A Reasoning can spend output budget explaining its thought process on terse prompts. Use a larger max_tokens cap or a stricter no-reasoning instruction when exact short answers are required.

quirks.title: OpenRouter ultra route hangs
quirks.body: nemotron-3-ultra (550B) on OpenRouter takes 180s+ even on trivial prompts (heavily congested), so its OR row is seeded disabled. Use the OpenCode Zen route instead.

quirks.title: Anonymous tier is 2 req/min
quirks.body: OVH AI Endpoints anonymous mode is documented at 2 req/min per IP per model (observed even stricter across models). The 400 req/min authenticated tier requires a Public Cloud project with a payment method, so the catalog ships the keyless path. Treat as a breadth/fallback tier, not a throughput tier.

quirks.title: Anon tier degraded (1 concurrent)
quirks.body: Pollinations’ legacy text API is deprecated for authenticated users (replacement enter.pollinations.ai is pay-as-you-go), but anonymous access is explicitly unaffected. Anon is queue-limited to 1 concurrent request per IP and serves a single model (openai-fast); expect 429 "Queue full" under any parallelism. Live-probed 2026-06-10.

quirks.title: Limited-time promo, roster rotates
quirks.body: OpenCode Zen free models are explicitly limited-time promotional access ("available for a limited time" per the docs), not a recurring quota. The roster rotates: qwen3.6-plus and minimax-m3 promos already ended. Expect any row here to die without notice; prompts/outputs may be used for model improvement.

quirks.title: Zen serves the 550B fast
quirks.body: OpenCode Zen serves nemotron-3-ultra in ~2s with working tool calls where the OpenRouter route hangs — the live-verified path for this model.

quirks.title: Works with existing Zhipu key
quirks.body: glm-4.6v-flash is listed Free on Z.AI and answers 200 with the existing bigmodel.cn key; vision and structured tool calls both live-verified.

quirks.title: Auto route needs token room
quirks.body: Kilo auto/free can route to reasoning models that spend 100+ internal reasoning tokens. Avoid tiny max_tokens or a request can finish by length with empty content.

quirks.title: Safety classifier output
quirks.body: This route returns moderation/safety labels rather than normal assistant prose. Use it as a guardrail model, not a primary chat model.

quirks.title: May emit thinking trace
quirks.body: Groq qwen/qwen3-32b may include <think> blocks unless prompted with /no_think. Strip or suppress the thinking trace when a plain answer is required.
